2.code:
change ∀ ε > 0, ∃ N : ℕ, ∀ n ≥ N, |a n - 0| < ε
intro ε espos; choose N Ngtinve using ArchProp espos
use N + 1; intro n ngeNp1_Nat
-- exact_mod_cast is needed to apply linarith on the next line 
have ngeNp1: (n: ℝ) ≥ (N + 1: ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast ngeNp1_Nat
have npos: (n: ℝ) > 0 := by linarith [ngeNp1]
rewrite [ha]; norm_num
have ngtinve: (n: ℝ) > 1/ε:= by linarith [ngeNp1, Ngtinve]
field_simp [espos] at ngtinve; field_simp [npos]
linarith [ngtinve]

2.code:
use 1 -- for L
intro ε ε_spos
use ⌈1 / ε⌉₊ + 1 -- for N
intro n n_ge_N; rewrite [ha]
-- transform the goal from |(↑n + 1) / ↑n - 1| < ε to 1 < ↑n * ε
-- n0 is needed even though not referred to, while norm_num gets rid of the abs
have n0: n > 0 := by linarith [n_ge_N]
field_simp; ring_nf; norm_num; field_simp

have n_gt_ceil_inv_e: (n: ℝ) > ⌈1 / ε⌉₊ := by
  have: n > ⌈1 / ε⌉₊ := by
    linarith [n_ge_N]
  exact_mod_cast this
have ceil_inv_e_gt_inv_e: ⌈1 / ε⌉₊ >= 1 / ε := by bound
have n_gt_inv_e: n > 1 / ε := by
  linarith [n_gt_ceil_inv_e, ceil_inv_e_gt_inv_e]
field_simp at n_gt_inv_e
linarith [n_gt_inv_e]

use 0
intro ε εpos
have εinvpos: 1 / ε > 0 := by bound
have ε3: ⌈1 / ε⌉₊ >= 1 / ε := by bound
use ⌈1 / ε⌉₊ + 2
intro n hn
ring_nf
rewrite [ha]
norm_num
have hn2: (n: ℝ) ≥ ⌈1 / ε⌉₊ + 2 := by exact_mod_cast hn
have hn3: (n: ℝ) > 0 := by linarith [hn2]
field_simp
have hn4: 1 / ε < (n: ℝ) := by bound
field_simp at hn4
have f1:1 < ε * n * n := by bound
have: ↑n ^ 2 * ε = ε * n * n := by field_simp
rewrite [this]
apply f1

use 3 / 2; intro ε εpos; use ⌈1/ε⌉₊; intro n hn; rewrite [ha]
field_simp; ring_nf; field_simp
have εinv_lt_εinvceil: 1 / ε ≤ ⌈1 / ε ⌉₊ := by bound
have hnR: ⌈1 / ε⌉₊ <= (n: ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast hn
have hn2: 1/ε ≤ (n: ℝ) := by bound;
field_simp at hn2
have g1: 0 <= 1 / (10 + (n:ℝ) * 4) := by bound
have : |1 / (10 + (n:ℝ) * 4)| = 1 / (10 + (n:ℝ) * 4) := by apply abs_of_nonneg g1
rewrite [this]; field_simp; linarith [hn2, εpos]

1.code:
intro ca;
choose L hL using ca
specialize hL (1/4) (by linarith); choose N hN using hL; have hN' := hN
have f0: 1/((N:ℝ) + 4) <= (1/4) := by bound
specialize hN  (2*(N+4)  ) (by bound); rewrite [ha2n  ] at hN;  push_cast at hN
have hL: 5/2 < L := by
  have : 3 - 1 / (↑N + 4) - L <= |3 - 1 / (↑N + 4) - L| := by bound
  bound
specialize hN' (2*(N+4)+1) (by bound); rewrite [ha2np1] at hN'; push_cast at hN'
have hL': L < 3/2 := by
  have : |-(1 + 1 / (↑N + 4) - L)| = |1 + 1 / (↑N + 4) - L| := by apply abs_neg
  rewrite [←this] at hN'
  have : (-(1 + 1 / (↑N + 4) - L)) <= |(-(1 + 1 / (↑N + 4) - L))| := by bound
  bound
linarith [hL, hL']

intro ε εpos;
specialize h (ε/2) (by bound)
choose N hN using h;
use N
intro n ngeN
specialize hN n ngeN
specialize b_scaled n;
rewrite [b_scaled]
have: 2 * a n - 2 * L = 2 * (a n - L) := by bound
rewrite [this]
have: |2 * (a n - L)| = |2| * |(a n - L)| := by apply abs_mul 
rewrite [this]
norm_num
linarith [hN]

intro ε εpos;
specialize ha (ε/2) (by bound); choose Na hNa using ha
specialize hb (ε/2) (by bound); choose Nb hNb using hb
use Na + Nb; intro n hn; rewrite [hc]
specialize hNa n (by bound)
specialize hNb n (by bound)
have f1: a n + b n - (L + M) = (a n-L)+(b n-M):= by ring_nf
rewrite [f1]
have: |a n - L + (b n - M)| <= |a n - L| + |b n - M| := by apply abs_add
linarith [this, hNa, hNb]

1.code:
by_contra; have LneM: L-M ≠ 0 := by bound
have f1: 0 < |L-M| := by apply abs_pos_of_nonzero LneM
specialize aToL (|L - M|/2) (by bound); choose N1 hN1 using aToL
specialize aToM (|L - M|/2) (by bound); choose N2 hN2 using aToM
specialize hN1 (N1+N2) (by bound); specialize hN2 (N1+N2) (by bound)
have teLMa: |L - M| ≤ |a (N1 + N2) - L| + |a (N1 + N2) - M| := by
  have : |(L - a (N1 + N2))+(a (N1 + N2) - M)| <= |L - a (N1 + N2)| + |a (N1 + N2) -M| := by apply abs_add 
  ring_nf at this
  have f3: L - a (N1 + N2) = -(a (N1 + N2)-L) := by ring_nf
  rewrite [f3] at this;
  have f4: |(-(a (N1 + N2) - L))| = |a (N1 + N2) - L| := by apply abs_neg
  rewrite [f4] at this
  apply this
linarith [hN1, hN2, teLMa]

2.code:

specialize aToL (|L|/5) (by bound)
choose N hN using aToL
use N
intro n ngeN
specialize hN n ngeN
have te: |-a n| + |a n - L| >= |-a n + (a n - L)| := by apply abs_add
ring_nf at te; rewrite [abs_neg] at te; rewrite [abs_neg] at te
linarith [modLpos, hN, te]

use N
intro n ngeN
specialize hN n ngeN
rewrite [bEqAbsa]
-- Two things behave badly here
-- Lean misinterprets | as a match
-- The server can lag by several  seconds or more on each change,
-- and accumulates across keystrokes
-- lags
have : abs (|a n| -|L|) ≤ |a n - L| := by
  apply abs_Lipschitz
bound

4.code:
intro ε εspos
have absLgt0: 0 < |L| := by apply abs_pos_of_nonzero LneZero
have epsL2gt0: 0 < ε * (|L| * |L|) / 2 := by bound
have _2gt0: 0 < 2 := by norm_num

have abs_flip: ∀ (p q: ℝ), |p-q| = |q-p| := by {
  intro p q
  have f2: q-p=-(p-q) := by ring_nf
  rewrite [f2]
  have f3: |-(p-q)| = |p-q| := by apply abs_neg
  rewrite [f3]; rfl  
}
have hmin: ∀ (p q: ℝ), (p+q-|p-q|)/2 <= p ∧ (p+q-|p-q|)/2 <= q := by {
    intro p q
    split_ands
    have f1 : (q-p)/2 <= |q-p|/2:= by bound
    rewrite [← abs_flip p q] at f1
    linarith [f1]
    have f2 : (p-q)/2 <= |p-q|/2:= by bound
    linarith [f2]
}
have lemR: ∀ (x : ℝ), (x < 0 ∨ x ≥ 0) := by {
  intro x
  by_contra h
  have h1 : x < 0 := by
    by_contra h2
    have h5 : x ≥ 0 := by linarith [h2]
    apply h; right; apply h5
  apply h; left; apply h1
}
have hmin2: ∀ (p q: ℝ), (p+q-|p-q|)/2 >= p ∨ (p+q-|p-q|)/2 >= q := by {
     intro p q
     have h1 := lemR (p-q)
     cases' h1 with hp hq

     rewrite [abs_flip p q]
     have h3: |q-p| = q-p := by apply abs_of_nonneg (by bound)
     rewrite [h3]; ring_nf;
     left; bound
     
     have h5: |p-q| = p-q := by apply abs_of_nonneg (by bound)
     rewrite [h5]; ring_nf
     right; bound
}
have dmin: ∀ (p q: ℝ), ∃ m, m=(p+q-|p-q|)/2 := by {
  intro p q;
  use (p+q-|p-q|)/2
}
have cty: ∃ δ > 0, ∀ x, |x - L| < δ → |1/x - 1/L| < ε := by {
  choose δ hδ using dmin (ε * (|L| * |L|) / 2) (|L|/2)
  use δ
  split_ands
  -- case h.refine_1 =>
  rewrite [hδ]
  have f1 := hmin2  (ε * (|L| * |L|) / 2) (|L|/2)
  cases' f1 with c1 c2
  linarith [c1, epsL2gt0]
  linarith [c2, absLgt0]
  -- case h.refine_2 =>
  intro x xnear
  have f7: δ ≤ |L| / 2 := by {
    rewrite [hδ]
    have f6 := hmin  (ε * (|L| * |L|) / 2) (|L|/2)
    apply f6.right
  }
  have f8: |x-L| < |L|/2 := by linarith [xnear, f7]
  have f9: |x| >= |L|/2 := by {
    have f10: |L-x+x| <= |L-x|+|x| := by apply abs_add
    ring_nf at f10
    rewrite [abs_flip L x]  at f10
    linarith [f8, f10]
  }
  have absxgt0: 0 < |x| := by {
    linarith [f9, absLgt0]
  }
  have xneZero: x≠0 := by apply nonzero_of_abs_pos absxgt0
  have f1: 1 / x - 1 / L = (L-x)/(x*L) := by field_simp
  rewrite [f1]
  have f2: |(L - x) / (x * L)| = |L-x|/|x*L| := by apply abs_div
  rewrite [f2]
  have f3: L-x = -(x-L) := by ring_nf
  rewrite [f3]
  have f4: |-(x-L)| = |x-L| := by apply abs_neg
  rewrite [f4]
  have f5: |x*L| = |x| * |L| := by apply abs_mul
  rewrite [f5]
  field_simp
  have f11: δ ≤ (ε * (|L| * |L|) / 2) := by {
    rewrite [hδ]
    apply (hmin  (ε * (|L| * |L|) / 2) (|L|/2)).left
  }
  have f12: |x - L| < ε * (|L| * |L|) / 2 := by bound
  have f13: (|L|/2) * |L| * ε  <= |x| * |L| * ε := by bound
  have f14: (|L|/2) * |L| * ε = (ε * (|L| * |L|) / 2) := by ring_nf
  rewrite [f14] at f13
  linarith [f12, f13]
}
choose δ hδ using cty
have δpos := hδ.left
have hxfer := hδ.right
specialize aToL δ δpos
choose N hN using aToL
use N
intro n hn
specialize bEqInva n
rewrite [bEqInva]
specialize hN n hn
specialize hxfer (a n) hN
apply hxfer
